title: Admiral Decision Entry Schema v1
description: Canonical schema for decision entries stored in the Brain. Captures the decision, alternatives considered, reasoning, authority tier, agent identity, and outcome. Used for causality tracing and audit.

alternatives.description: Alternatives that were considered before reaching this decision.

reasoning.description: Why this decision was chosen over the alternatives.

authorityTier.description: The authority tier under which this decision was made.

agent.description: The agent that made the decision.

outcome.description: The outcome of the decision, if known.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the decision was made.

dependencies.description: Brain entry IDs that this decision depends on. Used for contradiction escalation.

context.description: Additional context about the circumstances of the decision.

reversible.description: Whether this decision can be reversed.
